title: FishContainment
description: FishContainment entity represents a fish containment unit (tank, cage, pond, or any enclosed water structure) used in aquaculture to house and monitor fish populations and water quality parameters

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity Type. It has to be FishContainment

category.description: Property. Category or type of the fish containment unit (e.g. Tank, Cage, Pond, Net)

refSump.description: Relationship. Reference to the Sump unit associated with this fish containment

refFarm.description: Relationship. Reference to the Farm entity that manages this fish containment unit

depth.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'m'. Depth of the fish containment unit in metres

videoStream.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/URL'. URL of the video stream providing live monitoring of the fish containment unit

temperature.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'Cel'. Array of water temperature measurements (degrees Celsius) recorded at different depths of the containment unit

items.description: Property. Single water temperature measurement in degrees Celsius recorded in the containment unit

dissolvedOxygen.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mg/L'. Dissolved oxygen concentration measured in the fish containment unit

pH.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Water pH level measured in the fish containment unit

redoxPotential.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mV'. Oxidation-reduction (redox) potential of the water in the containment unit

turbidity.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'NTU'. Water turbidity level measured in the fish containment unit

conductivity.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mS/cm'. Electrical conductivity of the water in the fish containment unit

salinity.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'g/kg'. Water salinity level measured in the fish containment unit

totalDissolvedSolids.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'mg/L'. Total dissolved solids concentration measured in the fish containment water

marineCurrents.description: Property. Description of water currents present in or affecting the fish containment unit

feedingOperation.description: Property. Reference or description of the feeding operation or automated feeder device associated with this fish containment unit

observation.description: Property. Free-text observations or notes about the current state of the fish containment unit

threats.description: Property. Description of threats, anomalies, or risks detected in or around the fish containment unit

startedAt.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'. Date and time when the monitoring or operational session for the fish containment started

fishDensity.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Units:'kg/m3'. Array of fish density measurements recorded at different depths of the containment unit

items.description: Property. Single fish density measurement in kg per cubic metre recorded at one depth layer

fishSpeed.description: Property. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'. Average swimming speed of fish measured inside the containment unit

fishDirection.description: Property. Predominant swimming direction of fish in the containment unit (e.g. N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW, NA)
